name: Tomato, Orange and Celery Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Ripe tomatoes, cut into quarters
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
Thin strips of blanched orange rind, to garnish
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 minutes Cooking time: 30 minutes
Freezing: recommended for up to 3 months
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan and add the onion, potato, garlic, celery, and carrot. Cook, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are softened.
Add the tomatoes and cook for 2-3 more minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato puree, orange juice, vegetable stock, and basil. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender. Pass the soup through a sieve to extract skins and pips. Check the seasoning before reheating gently. Serve garnished with the blanched orange rind.
